# Schmidt Construction

> Family-owned retaining wall, concrete, seawall, and hardscape contractor serving the Omaha, Nebraska metro since 1973. Licensed & insured. Free estimates.

Schmidt Construction specializes in engineered retaining walls (block, timber, commercial, and terraced) built with proper drainage to last through Nebraska's freeze-thaw seasons. We also do concrete flatwork and driveways, stamped/decorative concrete, lakefront seawalls, landscapes and hardscapes, and remodeling.

## Key facts
- Business: Schmidt Construction (Schmidt Construction Omaha)
- Founded: 1973, family-owned
- Location: Omaha, Nebraska, USA
- Phone: (402) 320-2600
- Email: Mikiel@schmidt-construction.com
- Website: https://www.schmidtwalls.com/
- Licensed & insured
- Free, no-obligation on-site estimates

## Service area
Omaha, Bellevue, Papillion, La Vista, Elkhorn, Gretna, Council Bluffs (IA), and surrounding communities in the Omaha metro.

## Services
- Retaining walls — block, timber, commercial, terraced; engineered drainage
- Concrete & driveways — flatwork, stamped, decorative
- Seawalls — lakefront and waterfront construction and repair
- Landscapes & hardscapes — patios, steps, grading
- Remodeling — kitchens, bathrooms, basements

## Common questions
- How much does a retaining wall cost in Omaha? Most residential block retaining walls run roughly $30–$100+ per square face foot installed; free on-site estimates available.
- Do you offer free estimates? Yes, free and no-obligation across the Omaha metro.
- Areas served? Omaha, Bellevue, Papillion, La Vista, Elkhorn, Gretna, Council Bluffs.
- Licensed and insured? Yes, since 1973.

## Contact
